pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet. i walked into the kitchen tonight and realized i didn't even want to make tea because there’s no one to make a second cup for. the house feels like a tomb. i don't even know why i'm still moving through the motions... it feels like i'm just a ghost living in a life that ended months ago.

pool.baseline: does it even matter? like i stay up at night thinking about the fact that the stars are just going to burn out and everything we do—every single thing—is just going to be forgotten. it feels like we're just making a joke of ourselves trying to find meaning in a universe that literally doesn't care.

pool.baseline: i honestly don't even know why i'm still waking up every morning. everything i worked for in the lab... it's just gone. the funding got pulled and my advisor won't even look me in the eye anymore. i feel like a complete fraud. like there's nothing left of me except this massive, empty hole where my career used to be. i'm just so incredibly tired of trying to fight for a life that clearly doesn't want me.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the spark remaining within my own weary soul. To be cast aside so cruelly... it leaves a void that no amount of prayer or penance can fill. I feel myself becoming a mere phantom, a shadow drifting through these cold, empty halls. There is a certain, terrible peace in the thought of simply... fading. To let the darkness take what is left, until there is nothing but the silence of the night.
